commitStrategyReview.notes: Plan implementation complete. Dead runtime surface pruned, legacy hooks retired, and documentation aligned.

units.purpose: correct the active 010 plan lifecycle, phase model, and gatekeeper readiness to match the real repository state

summary: replace the stale five-phase plan narrative with the current dead-code and doc-reconciliation pass
remove premature gatekeeper readiness and keep commit units below ready state until validation can run
record the archived 009 state and the current top-level plan inventory accurately

units.purpose: remove dashboard guest hooks that no longer have runtime consumers and migrate their dedicated tests to active dashboard hooks

summary: remove guest hooks that survive only through a legacy test surface and are not used by the live dashboard runtime
rewrite the dedicated hook test around the active dashboard hooks instead of preserving the retired API
keep dashboard routes and api contracts unchanged

units.purpose: repair dangling internal runtime dependencies and remove only objectively broken or unused internal surface

messagePreview.header: refactor(runtime): prune safe dead runtime surface
summary: remove the dangling hero parallax wrapper dependency from the live component tree
keep the premium hero motion behavior local to the owning component
avoid broader behavior-wrapper cleanup that is not yet provably dead

units.purpose: align active documentation and discovery surfaces with the current invitation page-data boundary and top-level plan inventory

summary: keep active architecture and conventions centered on feature-owned page-data assembly instead of legacy compatibility surfaces
synchronize the documentation dashboard with the real active-plan inventory
leave historical presenter references confined to archived or explicitly historical docs
